title: alchemilla pubescens subvar. serbica
intro: Alchemilla pubescens subvar. serbica, also known as the Serbian lady's mantle, is a subspecies of the lady's mantle plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Alchemilla pubescens subvar. serbica can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it has also been used in salves and creams to promote skin health and reduce the appearance of scars.
